features.featureTitle: Update the WhatsApp link stored in the backend to use the company phone number +91 891 883 2546, so that all WhatsApp entry points (floating chat button, 'Order Sample' CTA in the hero, 'Message on WhatsApp' button in the quote section) resolve to https://wa.me/918918832546

Replace the text-based logo in the Navigation bar with a chic, gold-styled 'SS' monogram mark. The logo should be an inline SVG or styled HTML element featuring the letters 'SS' in a luxury gold gradient (using the site's existing gold token, approximately #C9A84C), with elegant thick typography and a refined, high-end feel consistent with the overall luxury B2B theme. The brand name 'SS GLOBAL TRADES' may appear beside it in a smaller weight. The logo must render cleanly on both desktop and mobile.
